nodes.snippet:
export function toToolKind(toolName: string): ToolKind {
  const tool = toolName.toLocaleLowerCase()

  switch (tool) {
    case "bash":
    case "shell":
      return "execute"

    case "webfetch":
      return "fetch"

    case "edit":
    case "apply_patch":
    case "patch":
    case "write":
      return "edit"

    case "grep":
    case "glob":
    case "context":
    case "context7_resolve_library_id":
    case "context7_get_library_docs":
      return "search"

    case "read":
